name: Guztchian's Blog
description: 你正在看的这个站点——暖调纸质主题、陶土色点缀，支持双语切换、音乐播放、项目展示与全文搜索，基于 Astro 构建，静态部署于 GitHub Pages。
descriptionEn: The site you're viewing right now — warm paper-toned theme with clay accents, bilingual, with a persistent music player, project showcase, and full-text search. Built with Astro, deployed on GitHub Pages.

name: WeRead
description: 微信公众号文章定时爬取与 AI 智能摘要工具。订阅你关注的公众号，定时抓取最新文章，由 AI 自动生成结构化阅读简报。
descriptionEn: A WeChat official account scraper with AI-powered summarization. Subscribe to accounts and receive structured reading digests automatically.

name: Office-Preview
description: Obsidian 插件：在 Obsidian 中预览 Office 文档（Word、Excel、PowerPoint）。
descriptionEn: Obsidian plugin: preview Office documents (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) directly inside Obsidian.

name: MineSweeper
description: 经典的扫雷游戏，使用 C++ 编写。该项目为C++学习练手项目，旨在帮助初学者理解面向对象编程和游戏开发的基本概念。
descriptionEn: Classic Minesweeper game written in C++. A learning project aimed at helping beginners understand OOP and game development fundamentals.

name: AutoOdom
description: 复现 Autodom 论文的足式机器人里程计系统。基于 Isaac Sim 训练强化学习行走策略，从关节角度、IMU 等本体感知数据中学习里程计预测，支持 Booster T1 和 MagicBot Z1 双平台，含 ROS2 实物采集管线。
descriptionEn: A legged-robot odometry system reproducing the Autodom paper. Trains RL locomotion policies in Isaac Sim, learns odometry from proprioception (joint angles, IMU), supports Booster T1 & MagicBot Z1 platforms, with ROS2 real-world data collection pipeline.
